About Us

We Are What We Do

Brexphil Inc. is a registered Investment management firm that specializes on Cryptocurrency Investment, Agriculture Investment, Real Estate Investment, Cannabis Investment and Precious metals. We provide a dynamic investment solution to investors in need of a self-operating portfolio, as well as a smart funds with flexible time and investment capitals. It’s our purpose to make a positive and sustainable impact on the future of our investors and our communities, because we care about their well-being and success. Driven by our shared values and behaviours, we collaborate across the globe and find innovative ways to fulfil this purpose. Together we make it happen.

Learn More
Premium Services

Our Core Services

  • Crypto Investment
  • Real Estate
  • Agriculture
  • Cannabis
  • Precious Metals

Crypto Investment

We are Brexphil Inc., an investment company with a focus on blockchain and cryptocurrencies that oversees over $700 million across three venture funds and four cryptocurrency hedge funds. Accredited investors seeking to invest $100,000 or more in digital assets or blockchain-based businesses may access our funds.

Real Estate

As one of the world's largest investors in real estate, we own and operate iconic properties in the world's most dynamic markets.

With innovation, an experienced staff, and a dedicated team of contractors, Brexphil Inc. unites real estate investors and business moguls on a single platform, reinventing the concept of pooled investment funds.

Agriculture

Farmland portfolios of the highest caliber are what Brexphil Inc. is committed to creating for family offices and institutional investors. Our objective is to provide clients seeking consistent income and long-term growth with investment opportunities in both row and permanent crop farms.

Cannabis

For family offices and big investors, we at Brexphil Inc. are committed to building outstanding cannabis portfolios. Our goal is to offer clients investment possibilities in both indoor and outdoor cannabis farms who are seeking for steady income and long-term growth.

Precious Metals

Silver: The precious metal is a great conductor of both heat and electricity, making it perfect for multiple streams for example its use in solar panels. In 2023, the Silver Institute expects global demand for silver to slip to 1.15 billion ounces, but that would still be the second highest year ever for worldwide silver consumption. Demand for silver is surging, due to its combined appeal as a tangible safe haven asset and its various industrial uses.

Why Brexphil Inc.

Why Choose Brexphil Inc. ?

01

Legal Company

Our company conducts absolutely legal activities in the legal field. We are certified to operate investment business, we are legal and safe.

02

High Reliability

We are trusted by a huge number of people. We are working hard constantly to improve the level of our security system and minimize possible risks.

03

Quick Withdrawal

Our all retreats are treated spontaneously once requested. There are high maximum limits. The minimum withdrawal amount is only $10.

04

Referral Program

We are offering a certain level of referral income through our referral program. you can increase your income by simply refer a few people.

05

24/7 Support

We provide 24/7 customer support through e-mail and livechat. Our support representatives are periodically available to elucidate any difficulty.

06

Anonymity

Anonymity and using cryptocurrency as a payment instrument. In the era of electronic money – this is one of the most convenient ways of cooperation.

Why Choose Us

Why Invest With Us?

At Brexphil Inc. we consider environmental, social and governance (ESG) issues throughout the investment decision-making process and life-cycle

We believe that robust and well-implemented ESG policies and practices contribute directly to the long-term success and sustainability of our portfolio companies. Implemented effectively, they help us to protect and enhance reputation and financial performance whilst creating stronger, more valuable companies which can create benefits for all stakeholders: from employees to customers, suppliers to shareholders, and the wider community at large.

We review our approach to ESG regularly to ensure that it continues to reflect best practice.

Let’s discuss about how we can help you
build wealth for the future

Invest Now
Faq

Asked Any Questions

Why is Brexphil Inc. different from others?
We offer product diversification. Which means that we split every investment in Real estate, cannabis, crypto currency’s, precious metals and agriculture. We have long-term results, our algorithms guide us towards profitable paths.
Does it cost anything to register?
Registration is free of charge.
How do I know where to start?
You can register by clicking on the "Get Started" button and even refer.
How can I deposit into my account?
In order to make a deposit click on make deposit in your dashboard. Fill desired amount in the 'Amount' field, choose payment system that you use and click 'Confirm'. Follow further instructions of your payment system.
